creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Wietse Venema wrote:
> beat@FreeBSD.org:
>> Synopsis: www/seamonkey2 build error (.../mozilla-config.in: No such file or directory)
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
>> State-Changed-By: beat
>> State-Changed-When: Thu Jan 7 08:09:36 UTC 2010
>> State-Changed-Why: 
>> Is your portstree up to date? If not, please update your portstree and
>> try it again.
>>
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=142398
> 
> I downloaded the latest seamonkey2.tar.gz file from the FreeBSD
> ports website at http://www.freebsd.org/ports. The last update
> was Jan 5, 2009, and I submitted the PR on Jan 6.
> 
> I note that the "missing file" error happens while "patching for
> FreeBSD", before the build process actually begins.

Seamonkey 2 needs at least revision 1.15 of Mk/bsd.gecko.mk:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-ports/2009-November/183851.html

It looks like you're using an older version of Mk/bsd.gecko.mk for
building Seamonkey 2.

Please update your portstree to get a recent version of bsd.gecko.mk and
try to build seamonkey2 again.

Beat
